_comment: RhymeBook MCP Server Configuration for Claude Desktop
_instructions: 1. Build the server first:  npm run build
2. Replace the path below with your actual installation path
3. Copy this config to your Claude Desktop config location:
--stdio flag is REQUIRED for Claude Desktop (JSON-RPC over stdin/stdout).
A sidecar HTTP server for audio files starts automatically on ASSET_PORT
(default 3002).  Set ASSET_PORT env var to change it if 3002 is in use.
All server logs go to stderr and are visible in Claude Desktop's MCP logs.

rhymebook.description: RhymeBook - AI Music Artist Studio (lyrics, beats, sessions)
